privileged_info_summary: The task instructs users to create a new QGIS project and save it as 'my_first_project.qgs' in the '/home/ga/GIS_Data/projects' directory. Both metadata claims have been verified: (1) '.qgs' is the standard QGIS XML project file format supported by QGIS 3.x, confirmed in QGIS documentation and by the project setup scripts; (2) '/home/ga/GIS_Data/projects' is the projects subdirectory explicitly created during environment setup for the 'ga' user at /home/ga. The task creates synthetic data (a new project file) with no external data dependencies.
